extraction_notes: Extracted from 157-page schematic PNGs + pdftotext (204 U-designators found). Pro/Max BOM variants noted where applicable.

ics.description: Main SoC. Pro has 8-core CPU + 14/16-core GPU. Max has 10-core CPU + 24/32-core GPU. More SoC power domains than M2 base (CPU, GPU, SRAM, DISP, DCS, VDD1, VDD2, VDDQ, APR, ANE, CIO, Fabric, Fixed, VDDIO, VDD2H0, VDD2H1).

ics.function: SVR AON — 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator
ics.description: 30A ICC MAX multi-phase buck producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON. Same role as A2681. Component range: R57xx, C57xx, R58xx, C58xx.
Slave PMU with 22+ system bucks (BUCK0-BUCK21, BUCK15 not used on p7 designs). Far more outputs than A2681. VODCOM Vout=3.7V shared by SMC.
Master PMU with 10+ system bucks (BUCK1-BUCK10). Has Pro vs Max BOM variant table (checkerboard, page 41). JM8170 companion IC nearby.
ics.bom_variants: Pro and Max have different BOM options for GPU power phases

ics.description: Multi-phase voltage regulator controller for high-current SoC domains. NOT present on A2681. Controls power stages on pages 48-49. Differential-twisted routing required for VIPER_ADDR_1, ALERT_SMEL, VIPER CURRENT signals.

ics.function: Monaco multi-output VR — GPU/fabric/SoC dynamic domains
ics.description: Custom Apple ORCT_TABLE IC. Multiple instances (Monaco 0, 1, 4). 10 buck outputs per instance. NOT present on A2681. Handles: PPVDD_S0VE, PPVDD_S0VS, PPVDD_MCPW, PPVDD_S0CL, PPVDD_GACS, PPVDD_S0DL, PPVDD_AGXS, PPVDD_S0KE, PPVDD_S0PE, PP3V3_S0MWLF.
Main charger IC. Multi-FET input stage (PG5x1-PG5x9 area). More complex gate drive than A2681. Converts USB-C/MagSafe input to PPBUS_AON.
Produces PP5V_S2 (5.14V, 3.1A max, 1.25MHz). Low power option. Startup 4.7/7.5/10.5ms. Different IC from A2681's UC300.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC0
ics.description: Left port 0. Same role as A2681. ORCT_TABLE IC with SPI ROM.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC1
ics.description: Left port 1. Inferred from page index — ATC1 port controller page 73.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC2
ics.description: RIGHT port. Different designator prefix (UG vs UF) from left ports. NOT present on A2681 (only 2 ports).
Handles HDMI output. ORCT_TABLE IC. Component range RKT4x, CK5xx. BOM ALTERNATES table. NOT present on A2681.
Controls SD card slot. Component range CR5xx, FR5xx. Has LR500 inductor for power. NOT present on A2681.
Dedicated NAND controller. Two instances: SSD0 Ocarina (page 102) and SSD1 Ocarina (page 107). NOT present on A2681 (simpler NAND direct). Component range CN4xx, CN6xx, RN4xx, FL4xx.
MagSafe connector. APN: MLB:516300787, Flex:516300788. Q5401 MOSFET pair.
Secure Element IC. Same function as A2681 Ceres SE.
Located near U8100 (MPMU). Visible on page 41.
